checkpoints.title: Structured spec locked
checkpoints.rubric: Spec JSON exists, declares >=8 checkpoints with rubrics, and weights sum to 10000.

checkpoints.title: Hero copy matches rubric
checkpoints.rubric: Hero contains a one-line headline, a benefit-led subhead, and a clear CTA. Reading-grade <= 9.

checkpoints.title: Responsive layout
checkpoints.rubric: HTML uses semantic landmarks (header/main/section). At least one viewport-aware CSS rule (media query OR fluid units).

checkpoints.title: No broken links
checkpoints.rubric: Every <a href> resolves to a non-empty fragment, mailto, or absolute URL. No href='#' placeholders.

checkpoints.title: Performance budget
checkpoints.rubric: Total HTML payload under 50KB. No <script src> over 100KB. No render-blocking @import in CSS.

checkpoints.title: Preview deployment
checkpoints.rubric: HTML declares <!doctype html> and a <title> tag. Otherwise the preview cannot be hosted.

checkpoints.title: Handoff bundle
checkpoints.rubric: Document includes a meta description and an Open Graph title for handoff into other channels.

checkpoints.title: Final audit
checkpoints.rubric: No inline event handlers (onclick=, onload=). No <script> with eval().

checkpoints.title: Agent repair loop
checkpoints.rubric: Page is internally consistent end-to-end: every CTA points somewhere meaningful and every section delivers on the headline promise.
